description.en: Temporal-difference learning gave reinforcement learning a compact way to learn predictions from experience. Instead of waiting for a final outcome, TD methods update value estimates using the next reward and the next prediction. This bootstrapping idea sits behind many later algorithms, including TD-Gammon, Q-learning, and actor-critic methods.
description.zh: 时序差分学习为强化学习提供了一种从经验中学习预测的紧凑方法。TD 方法不必等到最终结果，而是用下一步奖励和下一步预测来更新价值估计。这种自举思想支撑了 TD-Gammon、Q-learning 和 actor-critic 等后续算法。

html.en: Learning from delayed rewards required a way to assign credit before the entire episode ended.
html.zh: 从延迟奖励中学习需要一种在整个回合结束前分配信用的方法。

html.en: TD compares the current prediction with a reward plus the next prediction, then nudges the current value toward that target.
html.zh: TD 比较当前预测与“奖励加下一步预测”，再把当前价值向该目标推进。

html.en: Experts generally treat temporal-difference learning as a cornerstone of reinforcement learning. Its long-term legacy is the bootstrapping idea that value estimates can learn from later predictions, supporting Q-learning, actor-critic methods, and modern value-based control.
html.zh: 专家通常把时序差分学习视为强化学习的基石。它的长期影响在于提出价值估计可以从后续预测中自举学习，并支撑了 Q-learning、actor-critic 方法和现代基于价值的控制。

material.en: Machine Learning paper and RL histories
material.zh: Machine Learning 论文与强化学习史料

demo.en: Update a value estimate from the next prediction and reward
demo.zh: 用下一步预测和奖励更新价值估计

text.en: The gap between current prediction and one-step bootstrapped target.
text.zh: 当前预测与一步自举目标之间的差距。

text.en: A prediction is updated using another prediction.
text.zh: 用另一个预测来更新一个预测。

text.en: A function estimates expected future reward from a state.
text.zh: 估计从某状态出发的预期未来奖励。

title.en: Learning to predict by temporal differences

description.zh: TD 学习经典 Machine Learning 论文记录。
